subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of the people of that House. By My life! The departed and blessed one who was named Muhammad-'Alí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی اهل آن بیت را ذکر مینماید لعمری مرحوم مبرور الذی سمی بمحمد قبل علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @eulogies; reminiscences, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions
